title: Crafting Blades | ModernisM
description: a Modern, Gung Ho Minecraft experience, make a NUCLEAR REACTOR in Minecraft? Give it a try.
body:
![BigTitle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a99bcf413b941294f4bf55ab68401d6334137335.png)



# **Pre-loaded with 'Essential'**

# **[Over 100 manually tuned mods!]**

![Partition1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f30d90967ac8d23d3dbc631ab51b55d739df6ff3.png)

## **Enhancing Your Minecraft Experience: Satisfying, Immersive, and Challenging.**

*Share your best screenshot with the modpack to get featured!*


> Realism and strategy guides your journey. 'Crafting Blades' is a modpack that challenges you to survive, build, and thrive in a land filled with danger and opportunity. Your adventure begins weak, but with each step, you grow stronger as you explore and uncover hidden secrets.

**Key Features:**


> Settle & Defend - Explore vast landscapes, establish your base, and create intricate structures for expansion.  

> Trade & Interact - Encounter wandering traders and merchants, each offering unique goods and weaponry.  

> Fight & Conquer - Face increasingly powerful mobs as you venture deeper into the world for greater rewards. 

> Automate - Build large quarries and farming equipment. 
   

![Partition3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f30d90967ac8d23d3dbc631ab51b55d739df6ff3.png)

> 'Crafting Blades' is a lightweight modpack that brings visual enhancements and aesthetic upgrades to your Minecraft experience, immersing you in a world of adventure and craftsmanship.
